Mình sẽ chạy một batch read-only để lấy chính xác login/me cho operator và manager, đồng thời trích snippet menu thực tế từ Layout + router để xác nhận nó đang được dùng.

Ran terminal command:  cd /workspaces/FleziBCG/backend && /workspaces/FleziBCG/.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app

c = TestClient(app)

users = [
    ("operator", "password123"),
    ("manager", "password123"),
]

for username, password in users:
    login = c.post('/api/v1/auth/login', json={'username': username, 'password': password})
    token = None
    if login.status_code == 200:
        token = login.json().get('access_token')
    me_status = None
    me_json = None
    if token:
        me = c.get('/api/v1/auth/me', headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'})
        me_status = me.status_code
        try:
            me_json = me.json()
        except Exception:
            me_json = me.text
    print('USER', username)
    print('login_status', login.status_code)
    print('me_status', me_status)
    print('me_json', me_json)
PY

Read [](file:///workspaces/FleziBCG/frontend/src/app/components/Layout.tsx)

Read [](file:///workspaces/FleziBCG/frontend/src/app/routes.tsx)

Mình đã lấy được JSON /auth/me cho cả hai account; giờ sẽ lấy line-range chính xác để dán snippet Layout verbatim đúng format bạn yêu cầu.

Ran terminal command:  cd /workspaces/FleziBCG && nl -ba frontend/src/app/components/Layout.tsx | sed -n '1,220p'

Ran terminal command:  cd /workspaces/FleziBCG && nl -ba frontend/src/app/routes.tsx | sed -n '1,90p'

1) AUTH ME RESPONSES
- operator:
  - login_status: 200
  - me_status: 200
  - me_json: {"user_id":"opr-001","username":"operator","email":"operator@example.com","tenant_id":"default","role_code":"OPR","session_id":"f2d1f999-342f-4938-9b05-267511999009"}
- manager:
  - login_status: 200
  - me_status: 200
  - me_json: {"user_id":"pmg-001","username":"manager","email":"manager@example.com","tenant_id":"default","role_code":"PMG","session_id":"8de7f454-e94d-4650-91bb-3ab890168e1a"}

2) MENU BUILDER SNIPPET
- file: Layout.tsx
- snippet_1: lines 1-14
```tsx
import { Link, Navigate, Outlet, useLocation } from "react-router";
import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, LayoutDashboard, Layers, PlayCircle } from "lucide-react";
import { useMemo, useState } from "react";

import { useAuth } from "../auth/AuthContext";
import {
  getDefaultLandingForPersona,
  getPersonaEnforcementMode,
  getMenuItemsForPersona,
  isRouteAllowedForPersona,
  resolvePersonaFromUser,
} from "../persona/personaLanding.ts";
import { AccessDeniedScreen } from "./AccessDeniedScreen";
import { TopBar } from "./TopBar";
```
- snippet_2 (if needed): lines 26-40
```tsx
export function Layout() {
  const location = useLocation();
  const { currentUser } = useAuth();
  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false);

  const persona = resolvePersonaFromUser(currentUser);
  const enforcementMode = getPersonaEnforcementMode();

  if (persona === "DENY" && enforcementMode === "STRICT") {
    return <AccessDeniedScreen />;
  }

  const landing = getDefaultLandingForPersona(persona);
  const menuItems = getMenuItemsForPersona(persona);
  const canAccessCurrentPath = isRouteAllowedForPersona(persona, location.pathname, location.search);
```
- snippet_3 (if needed): lines 74-92
```tsx
        <nav className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-3">
          {menuItems.map((item) => {
            const Icon = getIconForPath(item.to);
            const targetPath = item.to.split("?")[0];
            const isActive = location.pathname === targetPath;

            return (
              <Link
                key={item.to}
                to={item.to}
                className={`flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-100 transition-all mb-1 ${isActive ? "bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 font-medium shadow-sm" : "text-slate-700"} ${sidebarCollapsed ? "justify-center" : ""}`}
                title={sidebarCollapsed ? item.label : ""}
              >
                <Icon className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0" />
                {!sidebarCollapsed && <span className="flex-1">{item.label}</span>}
              </Link>
            );
          })}
        </nav>
```
- notes: helper functions used by these snippets are useAuth, resolvePersonaFromUser, getMenuItemsForPersona, isRouteAllowedForPersona, getDefaultLandingForPersona, getPersonaEnforcementMode, getIconForPath; Layout is actively used by router at "/" route tree in routes.tsx to routes.tsx, so this is not dead code.
